title: hieracium cyclum
intro: Hieracium cyclum, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. Hieracium cyclum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in homeopathic remedies to treat a range of health conditions.
